palette: one signal red or yellow for markup
kicker_style: evidence labels (stamps, badges, map annotations), all caps, attached to visual elements
face: real likeness as document, small-to-medium, neutral; never AI faces or reaction shots
title_thumb_contrast: title tells the story, thumb text labels the evidence; never repeat title words except a proper noun that IS the evidence; annotation not caption

evidence_pairs.title: The Kids Who Hacked The CIA
The Hunt for the King of the Dark Web
How an FBI Agent Infiltrated the KKK
The Hunt for America's Smartest Killer
